dc.headline: TTU Wage pressure intensifying
dc.rightNow: +25.6% vs 10y avg, 3 consecutive months same direction, 100th percentile. Above 10y norm and rising → margin pressure on operators; expect storage-rate increases at lease renewal and a wave of automation announcements within 2-3 quarters.
